payload.summary: Reviewed all changed files (process_backend.rs, openrouter_backend.rs, service.rs, model.rs, and both test files) end-to-end. All 668 tests pass, clippy is clean. The implementation correctly extends TokenCounts with cache fields, parses Claude/Codex/OpenRouter usage data, emits structured tracing, and has comprehensive test coverage including backward compat, empty input, null/empty-object shadowing, and both Anthropic-native and OpenAI prompt_tokens_details cache paths. The defensive changes (checked_add, u32::try_from, usage-is-object filter) are sound. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.
